reason: Cannot achieve nop=0 with behavioral rewrite: the unit test (test_ingester_status_defaults_to_ready_when_key_absent) is added as part of the fix. On base (nop), cargo test -- <test_name> exits 0 with running 0 tests (no match). My behavioral assertions are tautological because: (a) test existence assertion passes on base when test is absent; (b) test behavior assertion also passes because cargo exits 0 when 0 tests matched. A stub returning Ready would also pass the new test. The original source-inspection approach was the only correct method for this task where the test is part of the fix artifact.
